title: 2025-09-15 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 8.35
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-09-15: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 8.35/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-09-15, the score printed 8.35/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
